subject: Series of negative tests that validate EMCO open api's All negative tests are in negative_tests directory
commit_message:
Series of negative tests that validate EMCO open api's
All negative tests are in negative_tests directory

Null is provided as an input to the POST, DELETE, and GET commands
and the behavior is observed

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1142
Signed-off-by: Aditya Sharoff <aditya.sharoff@intel.com>
Change-Id: I8ccf4b5615fc378698faf7f88971db1e250de9b6
Signed-off-by: Aditya Sharoff <aditya.sharoff@intel.com>

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

On the commit message, better, but still needs work. The summary line needs to be separated from the body by a blank.
Read here for some helpful guidance:  https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Commit+Messages

On the scripts - it seems like there's a lot of code in some scripts that is not relevant for what the test is covering.  Take test_OVN.sh as one example - it looks like there are hundreds of lines of unrelated code.

Patch Set 5:

To get this patch to pass the gerrit ci tests, you'll need to look at the failures in the verify-python job and fix them.

There's a part of that test which runs something call 'bashate' on bash scripts and checks for various things.

In recent successful patches, we have 7 bashate warnings and 0 errors in that section.

Currently this patch has:
8 bashate warning(s) found
196 bashate error(s) found

Patch Set 5:

Once all 196 bashate errors are fixed, the bashate check will pass again, since errors are not tolerated. Warnings are tolerated but not recommended.

Install bashate with: sudo apt install python-bashate

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

There's some more simplification you can do - a number of the tests (e.g. test_HPA.sh test_OVN, test_traffic_controller.sh, any other controllers) appear to all test the same thing - the controller api. So, you just need one test script, not multiple with different names.  Also, for this controller test, you do not need to create all of the other objects, e.g. project, composite app, profiles, etc.  The controller api does not depend on those.

Patch Set 11:

Move the test file under another under kud/tests
